message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor "ユーザ" as user
boundary "ブラウザ" as browser
control "web.php" as web
control "Kouka1_1Controller" as controller
entity "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" as index
entity "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" as layout
entity "components.menu.blade.php" as menu
entity "components.subview.blade.php" as subview

user -> browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka1_1]
browser -> web : GET[/kouka1_1]
web -> controller : @index
controller -> index
index <-> layout : @extends
layout <-> menu : @component
menu <-> subview : @include

@enduml
```
